desktopRouteTruth.head: avalonia
desktopRouteTruth.routeRoleReason: Avalonia Desktop route avalonia:linux:linux-x64 is the flagship desktop route for linux/linux-x64 and must carry independent startup verification before promotion.
desktopRouteTruth.promotionReason: Primary-route Avalonia Desktop tuple avalonia:linux:linux-x64 for linux/linux-x64 is not promoted until the flagship head has matching artifact bytes and fresh startup verification for this channel.
desktopRouteTruth.updateEligibilityReason: Primary-route updates are blocked until avalonia:linux:linux-x64 is promoted.
desktopRouteTruth.rollbackReason: Fallback route blazor-desktop:linux:linux-x64 is not promoted for linux/linux-x64 because matching artifact bytes and fresh startup verification are still required; primary route avalonia:linux:linux-x64 therefore requires manual recovery.
desktopRouteTruth.revokeReason: No registry revoke marker is active for avalonia:linux:linux-x64.
desktopRouteTruth.installPostureReason: Do not present avalonia:linux:linux-x64 as installable until the missing tuple proof is captured.
